name: RunLobster
description: An autonomous AI agent with its own computer that browses, codes, emails, builds, and ships. Connects to 3,000+ integrations including Stripe, HubSpot, Meta Ads, Google Ads, Notion, Linear, and GitHub. Features deep memory and task execution capabilities.
notes: Described as 'S-tier' solution for agent-native task execution. Agent connects to 3,000+ integrations and can deliver real business outputs autonomously. Particularly strong for automated report generation, workflow optimization, and business process automation.
